caption:
recording precious moments with @insta360 GO3 ✨🍌🐘🌿✨

📣 Insta360 GO3 GIVEAWAY 📣

Participate in one or more games (Up to 3); one winner per game will receive an Insta360 GO 3 Creator Kit! 🎁

To enter, simply check out the #AddYours challenge on my or @Insta360mysg IG Stories.

1.	Find something smaller than the Insta360 GO 3 camera and snap a picture of it! How tiny can you go? 🧐
2.	Hunt for epic mounting spots, and show us the result! Think outside the box 👀 (*Search “GO3” sticker for game 2*)
3.	Show us the world from your point of view! Share your hands-free POV snaps and let us see things from a new perspective 🌍

The more games you participate in, the higher your chances of winning. Giveaway winners will be announced Sep 19th 

Let the games begin 🎉

reel @dotzsoh @dotzsoh2 
#dotzsoh #insta360Go3 #insta360 #insta360mysg #insta360sg #chiangmai #amazingthailand #writeyourown2023

transcription.text: Hangin' low while I pop a bottle off of y'all chain Swangin' clang, clang and it cost a lot I'm always up to golly, yeah, and you are not bad Keep up goin' till you hit the spot, whoa I'm a big bag hunter with a bow She got a big bed, drop it low Mama called me and she happy with the glow Never ever fool with it, that's a no Just popped a kidney, I bought a million options Said it's time, can I stop doin' the greemin' I'm rockin' green, it's bringin' the peace I'm bumpin' that puck in the car Pretendin' I got all the eyes on me Gotta buy a baby if she's independent Too many people out there love me, they're seekin' attention When they want me by the groupies, man, I should've listened And the smell of the money must remind
